# LazyBridge

Zero-boilerplate Python agent framework. One `Agent`, swappable engines
(LLM / Plan / Human / Supervisor). Tools can be plain functions, other
Agents, Agents-of-Agents, or tool providers (e.g. an MCP server) — the
contract is uniform. Parallelism is automatic when the engine decides;
declared when you do. Pipelines are validated at construction time
(`PlanCompileError` before any LLM call).

## Documentation tracks

LazyBridge ships docs for two audiences. Same source of truth — fragments
under `lazybridge/skill_docs/fragments/` render into both surfaces via
`python -m lazybridge.skill_docs._build`.

### LLM track — preferred for assistants

Tier-organised reference, signature-first, dense. Load on demand
instead of ingesting the whole site.

- [SKILL manifest](https://github.com/selvaz/LazyBridge/blob/main/lazybridge/skill_docs/SKILL.md) — entry point + file index
- [Overview](https://github.com/selvaz/LazyBridge/blob/main/lazybridge/skill_docs/00_overview.md) — pick a tier
- [Basic tier](https://github.com/selvaz/LazyBridge/blob/main/lazybridge/skill_docs/01_basic.md) — `Agent`, `Tool`, `NativeTool`, `Envelope`
- [Mid tier](https://github.com/selvaz/LazyBridge/blob/main/lazybridge/skill_docs/02_mid.md) — `Memory`, `Store`, `Session`, `Guard*`, `chain`, `parallel`, `as_tool`, `MCP` (alpha — `lazybridge.ext.mcp`), `HumanEngine` (`lazybridge.ext.hil`), `EvalSuite` (`lazybridge.ext.evals`)
- [Full tier](https://github.com/selvaz/LazyBridge/blob/main/lazybridge/skill_docs/03_full.md) — `Plan`, `Step`, sentinels, `SupervisorEngine` (`lazybridge.ext.hil`), checkpoint/resume, exporters, `verify=`
- [Advanced tier](https://github.com/selvaz/LazyBridge/blob/main/lazybridge/skill_docs/04_advanced.md) — `Engine` protocol, `BaseProvider`, `Plan.to_dict`, `register_provider_*`, `core.types`
- [Decision trees](https://github.com/selvaz/LazyBridge/blob/main/lazybridge/skill_docs/05_decision_trees.md) — "when to use which"
- [API reference](https://github.com/selvaz/LazyBridge/blob/main/lazybridge/skill_docs/06_reference.md) — flat signature index
- [Errors](https://github.com/selvaz/LazyBridge/blob/main/lazybridge/skill_docs/99_errors.md) — cause → fix table

### Human track — narrative-first site

- [Quickstart](https://github.com/selvaz/LazyBridge/blob/main/docs/quickstart.md) — 5 min walkthrough
- [Tier pages](https://github.com/selvaz/LazyBridge/tree/main/docs/tiers) — Basic / Mid / Full / Advanced
- [Per-topic guides](https://github.com/selvaz/LazyBridge/tree/main/docs/guides)
- [Decision trees (mermaid)](https://github.com/selvaz/LazyBridge/tree/main/docs/decisions)
- [Recipes](https://github.com/selvaz/LazyBridge/tree/main/docs/recipes) — tool-calling, structured-output, plan-with-resume, HIL, MCP, orchestration
- [Examples](https://github.com/selvaz/LazyBridge/tree/main/examples) — LangGraph / CrewAI ports + pattern walkthroughs
